title: Login Authentication Failure
description: Users reporting 401 errors when attempting to log in via OAuth.

title: UI Alignment on Dashboard
description: The 'Export to PDF' button is overlapping with the search bar on mobile views.

title: Database Connection Timeout
description: Intermittent timeouts occurring during peak hours (14:00 - 16:00).

title: Missing Password Reset Email
description: Customer claims they are not receiving the recovery link after multiple attempts.

title: API Rate Limit Clarification
description: Requesting documentation on the maximum requests per minute for the v2 endpoint.

title: Slow Image Uploads
description: Uploads exceeding 5MB are taking over 60 seconds to process.

title: Production Server Spike
description: CPU usage is consistently above 90% on the US-East-1 instance.

title: Billing Discrepancy
description: User was charged twice for the March subscription cycle.

title: Broken Link in Footer
description: The 'Privacy Policy' link in the site footer leads to a 404 page.

title: Bulk Export Failure
description: Exporting more than 5,000 records results in a generic system error.

title: Dark Mode Contrast Issues
description: Text is difficult to read in dark mode on the settings page.

title: Security Vulnerability Patch
description: Need to update npm dependencies to address CVE-2026-1234.
